name: Chestnut Meringues
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------TO FINISH---------------------------------
1. Sweetened hot chocolate mix
2. Grease several baking sheets and line with parchment or waxed paper. Preheat oven to 275°F (135°C).
3. In a clean, grease-free bowl, beat egg whites until very stiff but not dry.
4. Add 1/2 tablespoon of the sugar; beat until sugar is incorporated and meringue is stiff and shiny.
5. Add remaining sugar gradually, beating well after each addition.
6. Beat in vanilla extract.
7. Carefully fold in chopped glazed chestnuts.
8. Spoon small oval shapes of mixture onto prepared baking sheets.
9. Lightly sprinkle the remaining 2 teaspoons sugar over the meringues.
10. Bake for 1-1/4 hours or until crisp and dry on the outside but soft inside; cool.
11. Sift hot chocolate mix lightly over each meringue.
12. Remove from paper.
